summary: Frontend testing completed for multiple new features: Admin analytics charts, Producer follower stats, Become Influencer page, and Seller AI Assistant. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Admin Dashboard: 'Vendedores' text displayed (renamed from Productor)
Admin Dashboard: Date range picker with 2 date inputs working
Admin Dashboard: Sales chart (Ventas por día) displaying with data
Admin Dashboard: Orders/Visits bar chart (Pedidos y Visitas) displaying
Admin Dashboard: Summary cards (Total Ventas €499.19, Total Pedidos 9, Total Visitas 710)
Producer Dashboard: Seguidores stat card showing follower count
Producer Dashboard: Follower growth chart (Crecimiento de Seguidores) displaying
Producer Dashboard: Days selector dropdown (7/30/90 días) working
Become Influencer Page: Hero section with 'Únete como Influencer' title
Become Influencer Page: Benefits section with 4 cards (Comisiones, Productos, Dashboard, Comunidad)
Become Influencer Page: Application form with name, email, social media fields
Become Influencer Page: Submit button 'Enviar Solicitud' present
Become Influencer Page: 'How it works' section with 3 steps
Seller AI Assistant: Button visible in producer dashboard (bottom right)
Seller AI Assistant: Panel opens with 'Hispalo AI - Asistente de Ventas' header
Seller AI Assistant: Quick prompts (Sugerir packs, Analizar tendencias, Optimizar precios, etc.)
Seller AI Assistant: Chat input field working
critical_code_review_comments: All features properly implemented with data-testid attributes for testing
Charts using Recharts library rendering correctly
Date range picker functional with proper date formatting
Seller AI Assistant positioned at bottom-right with z-50 for proper layering

success_rate.backend: N/A (backend already tested via curl per main agent)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Multiple features verified: 1) Admin dashboard has sales/visits charts with date range picker, 2) Producer dashboard has follower stats card and growth chart, 3) /become-influencer page has form and benefits section, 4) Seller AI Assistant button in producer dashboard opens chat panel with quick prompts. All Recharts visualizations rendering correctly.
